title: Solana Kit migration
summary: Helps developers understand when to use @solana/kit vs @solana/web3.js (v1), provides migration guidance, API mappings, and handles edge cases for Solana JavaScript...
author: sendaifun

executionFlow.title: Overview
executionFlow.content:
The Solana JavaScript ecosystem has two major SDK options:

| Library | Status | Use Case |
|---------|--------|----------|
| `@solana/web3.js` (1.x) | Maintenance mode | Legacy projects, Anchor-dependent apps |
| `@solana/kit` | Active development | New projects, performance-critical apps |

**Key Decision**: `@solana/kit` is the future, but migration isn't always straightforward.

landingGuidance.title: Operational guidance
landingGuidance.content:
- Confirm network, fee, and endpoint assumptions before sending transactions or requests.
- Prefer the protocol's documented production defaults over generic Solana defaults.
- Re-fetch official docs if live behavior diverges from the embedded guide.

failureHandling.title: Edge Cases & Gotchas
